articles.title: ₹2.75 to ₹151.50: Multibagger penny stock turns ₹1 lakh into ₹55 lakh in four years
articles.summary: Magnus Steel and Infra share price, which was once priced at ₹2.77 apiece in May 2022, is now trading at ₹151.50 on the BSE. Here's the share price trend and investment growth of the multibagger penny stock.

articles.title: Tamil Nadu election results impact: Why have Sun TV Network shares crashed over 9% today?
articles.summary: Sun TV, part of the Sun Group, is led by Indian billionaire media proprietor Kalanithi Maran — who is closely related to DMK leaders. Maran is the grandnephew of DMK president M Karunanidhi and nephew of the current chief minister MK Stalin.
articles.label: NEUTRAL

articles.title: Tactical tool or red flag? Inside the Q4 promoter pledging churn
articles.summary: Moderating pledge levels give way to resurfacing stress as market corrections expose underlying promoter debt

articles.title: 1,400% returns in five years! Multibagger small-cap stock Spice Lounge hits upper circuit
articles.summary: Spice Lounge Food Works share price has fallen 23% in one month and has declined 28% in three months. The smallcap has dropped 46% on a year-to-date (YTD) basis, while it has plunged 63% in six months.
articles.label: BEARISH

articles.title: Vinay Rajani of HDFC Sec suggests Tata Steel, Linde India shares to buy
articles.summary: The domestic equity benchmarks rallied on May 4, supported by positive auto stock performance and a dip in crude prices. Nifty 50 increased by 1% to 24,236, indicating a consolidation phase as it faces resistance levels, while broader markets may need time to stabilize.
articles.label: BULLISH

articles.title: BHEL Q4 results 2026: Profit jumps nearly threefold to ₹1,290 crore; declares a final dividend of ₹1.40 for FY26
articles.summary: BHEL Q4 results 2026: Profit jumped 156% year-on-year, or nearly threefold (2.6 times), to ₹1,290.47 crore. Revenue from operations for Q4FY26 saw a 37% YoY jump to ₹12,310.37 crore.
articles.label: BULLISH

articles.title: Small-cap pharma stock under ₹50 jumps 4% following Dalal Street rally
articles.summary: Sudarshan Pharma Industries saw a 4% stock price increase after reporting a 44.8% rise in Q4 net profit to ₹10.73 crore and a 36.72% revenue growth to ₹220.92 crore. For the year, net profit rose 55.64% and sales climbed 39.21%.
articles.label: BULLISH

articles.title: DMart shares tumble 4% after Q4 results, wipe off ₹9,300 crore from Radhakishan Damani & other promoters' wealth
articles.summary: Radhakishan Damani and other promoters of the company who cumulatively hold a 74.51% stake in the company, lost ₹9332 crore in notional wealth within minutes amid the decline in the counter.
articles.label: BULLISH

articles.title: Nifty may oscillate between 23,500 and 24,500 this week, likely to remain range-bound in near term
articles.summary: With geopolitical risks still unresolved and inflation concerns lingering, markets are expected to remain range-bound in the near term, with the Nifty likely to oscillate between 23,500 and 24,500 levels, with a mixed bias.
articles.label: BULLISH

articles.title: This drone maker stock rallies 17% to 52-week high on strong Q4 results. Do you own?
articles.summary: ideaForge share price hit a 52-week high on Monday, 4 May, after the company reported strong Q4 results. The company returned to black in Q4 FY26 while its revenue surged sevenfold.
articles.label: BULLISH

articles.title: Sensex jumps 1,000 points; investors earn ₹6L cr: Election result trends, other factors behind market rally explained
articles.summary: The 30-pack Sensex surged by 1,000 points, or 1.3%, to an intraday high of 77,911, while the NSE barometer Nifty 50 rose by 1.2% to the day's high of 24,290. Investors earned about ₹6 lakh crore in a single session.
articles.label: BULLISH

articles.title: Ola Electric share price jumps over 3% as April registrations climb 20% MoM
articles.summary: Ola Electric Mobility shares increased over 3% on May 4 after reporting a 20% rise in April registrations, from 10,133 to 12,166 units. This growth occurred despite a 22% decline in the overall electric two-wheeler market, highlighting strong consumer confidence and demand for Ola's EV lineup.
articles.label: BULLISH

articles.title: Crude oil price steadies amid US-Iran war uncertainty. Where's it headed in near term?
articles.summary: US-Iran war: MCX crude oil prices rose marginally amid no peace agreement and continued disruptions to traffic through the Strait of Hormuz. Analysts said the near-term bias is cautious and contingent on headline-driven developments in the Middle East war.
articles.label: BEARISH

articles.title: Gold, silver prices today: Check retail rates of 24K, 22K gold, 999 silver on 4 May in Delhi, Mumbai, Kolkata, others
articles.summary: On 4 May, gold prices in India remained stable, and silver prices also showed limited movement as traders await clarity on the US-Iran peace deal. Check retail rates of 24K, 22K gold, and 999 silver in your city.

articles.title: Rupee opens 4 paise lower at 94.95 against US dollar
articles.summary: The Indian rupee opened weaker at 94.95 against the US dollar, influenced by fluctuating oil prices and ongoing U.S.–Iran negotiations. Brent crude prices fell amid U.S. intervention efforts for stranded ships, while the rupee has dropped nearly 2% over the past eight days.
articles.label: BEARISH

articles.title: Distributors skirt SIF certification norms as talent shortage bites

articles.summary: Oil prices fell on Monday after President Trump announced efforts to free stranded ships in the Strait of Hormuz, yet remained above $100 due to ongoing U.S.-Iran tensions. Brent crude dropped to $107.53, while U.S. West Texas Intermediate fell to $101.10 amid stalled peace negotiations.

articles.summary: Eight Indian states, including Uttar Pradesh and Bihar, have set their fiscal deficit at 3% or below GSDP, indicating improved budget discipline. States like Punjab and Himachal Pradesh struggle with high liabilities.

articles.title: Government to roll out Panchayat Advancement Index 3.0 to boost data-driven grassroots planning, assess progress
articles.summary: In May, the government will introduce PAI 3.0 to evaluate gram panchayat performance using socio-economic indicators. This initiative aims to empower local bodies in rural areas, enhance service delivery, and align with Sustainable Development Goals.

articles.title: Jerome Powell is staying at the Fed. That isn’t Kevin Warsh’s biggest problem.
articles.summary: Warsh, Powell’s presumed successor as Federal Reserve chair, will take the reins in mid-May with Fed officials divided in their policy outlook and his predecessor still at the table.

articles.title: ‘Can’t get a job anywhere else’: Trump blasts Powell staying on Fed board
articles.summary: US President Donald Trump criticized Fed chief Jerome Powell, claiming he is staying at the Fed due to lack of job options. Powell confirmed he will remain on the Board until a criminal investigation concludes, while the Fed's decision saw dissent from four officials for the first time since 1992.
articles.label: BEARISH

articles.title: Govt mulls partial credit guarantee, interest subvention support for pvt sector electric bus, truck adoption
articles.summary: The heavy industries ministry is consulting stakeholders on partial credit guarantees and interest subsidies to make electric buses and trucks affordable for private operators, who run 90% of the country's buses but have been excluded from existing federal electric vehicle incentive schemes.

Jat, secretary, Department of Agricultural Research and Education, and director general, Indian Council of Agricultural Research (ICAR).

articles.title: China stays on top, India slips 3 spots: How the West Asia war changed EM ranks

articles.title: Will Iran war shake India's flagship welfare schemes? The finance ministry wants to find out
articles.summary: Schemes under review include the Pradhan Mantri Vishwakarma Yojana; Mudra Yojana; Svanidhi Yojana; and Surya Ghar Muft Bijli Yojana. The review will check whether external shocks could affect the implementation of these schemes.
